## Risk flags
- ⚠️  Không thấy bảng `auth.users` trong dump. Email mapping sẽ FAIL — tất cả `created_by` sẽ NULL.
## Bước tiếp theo
1. Review whitelist coverage & sample rows phía trên.
2. Chạy `npm run migrate:inspect` (Stage 1 — schema diff).
3. Nếu OK → `npm run migrate:load` (Stage 2).
